steps.t: Ashnân needs your help gathering the tools abandoned by the farm-hands in Burukíri. He suggested checking behind the house first.
You spotted some abandoned tools behind the house in Burukíri. Gather them so they can be returned to Ashnân.
Ashnân needs your help gathering the tools abandoned by the farm-hands in Burukíri. He said to check by the beehives next.
You spotted some abandoned tools near the beehives in Burukíri. Gather them so they can be returned to Ashnân.
Ashnân needs your help gathering the tools abandoned by the farm-hands in Burukíri. Ashnân thinks there may be some left by the mill.
You spotted some abandoned tools near the mill in Burukíri. Gather them so they can be returned to Ashnân.
Return to Ashnân in Burukíri and give him the abandoned tools you were able to recover.
